Dr. Xiaofei Zhang

Associate Professor

CS, University of Memphis xiaofei.zhang (at) memphis.edu

About Me

I am an Associate Professor in the Computer Science Department at the University of Memphis, where I direct the Data System Research (DSR) Lab. My research focuses on scalable data systems for large, dynamic, and distributed data, with an emphasis on graph data management, query processing, federated data services, and data-intensive parallel computing.

I earned my Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering from the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST) in 2013. Before joining the University of Memphis, I was a postdoctoral research fellow at the Cheriton School of Computer Science, University of Waterloo. Additionally, I was a postdoctoral fellow at the Chinese University of Hong Kong and HKUST in 2014 and 2015, respectively.

Research Themes

  • Graph database systems Scalable storage, indexing, and query optimization for large graph data.
  • Temporal and dynamic graphs Algorithms and systems for analyzing evolving graph structures and pathways.
  • Federated data services Efficient and secure query processing across distributed, independently managed data sources.
  • Data-intensive computing Parallel and distributed techniques for high-volume data management workloads.

Prospective Students

I welcome inquiries from motivated Ph.D. students interested in graph data management, distributed data systems, federated data services, and data-intensive computing. Prospective students are encouraged to email me with a brief description of their research interests and relevant background.

News

  • [Apr. 2026] Distinguished PC Award for ICDE’26.
  • [Jan. 2026] Full Member, Sigma Xi Scientific Research Honor Society.
  • [Dec. 2024] Our Next-Gen-BiGLA workshop was a success! Thank you all for your contribution and participation!
  • [May. 2024] Jiacheng joined the group, welcome!

Selected Publications

  1. ICDM 2025
    ChronoConnect: Tracking Pathways Along Highly Dynamic Vertices in Temporal Graphs
    Jiacheng Ding, Cong Guo, Xiaofei Zhang
    2025 IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM), Demonstration, pp. 2593-2596.
    PDF Code
  2. ICDM 2025
    Speciated Unsupervised Skill Discovery
    Ryan Wickman, Xiaofei Zhang
    2025 IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM), pp. 1655-1663.
    PDF Code
  3. GECCO 2023
    Efficient quality-diversity optimization through diverse quality species
    Ryan Wickman, Bibek Poudel, Taylor Michael Villarreal, Xiaofei Zhang, Weizi Li
    Proceedings of the Companion Conference on Genetic and Evolutionary Computation (GECCO), pp. 699-702, 2023
    PDF Code
  4. ICDM 2022
    A Generic Graph Sparsification Framework using Deep Reinforcement Learning
    Ryan Wickman, Xiaofei Zhang, Weizi Li
    IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM), pp. 1221-1226, 2022
    PDF Code
  5. PVLDB
    Hu-Fu: Efficient and Secure Spatial Queries over Data Federation
    Yongxin Tong, Xuchen Pan, Yuxiang Zeng, Yexuan Shi, Chunbo Xue, Zimu Zhou, Xiaofei Zhang, Lei Chen, Yi Xu, Ke Xu, Weifeng Lv
    Pro. of the VLDB Endowment Vol. 15(6), pp. 1159-1172.
    PDF Code
  6. PVLDB
    Correlation Constraint Shortest Path over Large Multi-Relation Graphs
    Xiaofei Zhang, M. Tamer Özsu
    Proc. of the VLDB Endowment, Vol. 12(5), pp. 488-501
    PDF

Please see my Google Scholar profile for the full list of publications.
